description: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the Quiz module 5.x, 6.x-2.x before 6.x-2.2, and 6.x-3.x before 6.x-3.0, a module for Drupal, allows remote authenticated users, with create quizzes or quiz questions access, to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via unspecified vectors.
